title: An Act for all licensees for beer to be drunk on the premises must list the alcohol by volume for each beer selection on the menu

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Garry of Dracut, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Colleen M. Garry relative to the listing of the alcohol by volume for beer selections on menus.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on House Rules
Reported, referred to the committee on Joint Rules, reported, rules suspended and referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/07/2025 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in A-2
